observedMutationClass: Repo-local skill entries had grown into policy bodies and duplicated owner document responsibilities.
acceptanceEvidenceClass: repo-local skill body slimming plus rules lint and artifact scope validation; no gameplay, Unity runtime, or WebGL product acceptance evidence
rootCause: The repo allowed skill-entry files to carry detailed flow/checklist/policy content even though ops.document-management-workflow defines skill-entry as an execution entrypoint that should not restate owner body.
prevention: Slimmed JG repo-local skills into trigger/read-order/router entries, restored common Plan Mode inspection/reference mutation guards, and routed policy body back to existing owner docs such as ops.codex-coding-guardrails, ops.document-management-workflow, ops.cohesion-coupling-policy, ops.acceptance-reporting-guardrails, ops.stitch-data-workflow, ops.stitch-structured-handoff-contract, ops.unity-ui-authoring-workflow, and design owner docs. Moved coupling review procedure and Unity/Stitch execution caveats into owner docs instead of leaving them only in skill bodies. Preserved existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: Passed npm run --silent rules:lint and npm run --silent workflow:artifact-scope after restoring safety clauses and owner-doc procedure coverage.
